title: Lower Puppy First
intendedTensionBeat: The lower puppy is visibly closer to water, making rescue order obvious without heavy punishment.
intendedReleaseBeat: Saving the lower puppy first clearly confirms that water changes priority, not thinking time.
expectedPath: Open the lower puppy route first, extract before water reaches it, then finish the safer upper puppy.
expectedFailMode: Player rescues the upper puppy first and sees the lower puppy become more endangered by accepted actions.
designNotes: First dedicated water-order teach. Keep dock generous and route shape readable.
